STATEMENT OF INTENDED DECISION OF JUDGE R. KENT GRUNEWALD FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALCAIDE, JOUY ESTATE OF LAURELIO ALCAIDE, DECEDENT $15,047.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,252.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,299.95, PLUS COSTS OF SUIT. TOTAL PRINCIPAL AMOUNT REPRESENTS, $8500.00 LOST WAGES, $547.00 MEDICAL TREATMENT AND $6000.00 GENERAL DAMAGES.
